scope_note: Penn’s official testing page focuses on current policy, superscoring, waivers, and self-reporting rather than score ranges. This panel stays policy-focused and school-wide.
policy: Penn requires the SAT or ACT for the 2025-26 application cycle. Applicants who have not taken the test and face hardship may request a waiver, Penn permits self-reported SAT/ACT scores, and it superscores both exams.

claims.claim: Penn requires the SAT or ACT for the 2025-26 application cycle.
Applicants who have not taken the SAT or ACT and face hardship may request a testing waiver.
Penn allows self-reported SAT/ACT scores and superscores both the SAT and ACT.
